ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country in which the league is held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league in which the match was played */,
  "division" TEXT /* League or division in which the match was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "full_time_home_goals" INTEGER /* Full time home goals scored */,
  "full_time_away_goals" INTEGER /* Full time away goals scored */,
  "full_time_result" TEXT /* Result at full time (H, A, D) */,
  "half_time_home_goals" INTEGER /* Half time home goals scored */,
  "half_time_away_goals" INTEGER /* Half time away goals scored */,
  "half_time_result" TEXT /* Result at half time (H, A, D) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league in which the team competes */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "home_colors" TEXT /* Home colors of the team */,
  "away_colors" TEXT /* Away colors of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the referee */,
  "yellow_cards_given" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards given by the referee */,
  "red_cards_given" INTEGER /* Total red cards given by the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player statistics entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmakers" (
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmaker */,
  "bookmaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the bookmaker */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the bookmaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_odds" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the odds entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match for which odds are listed */,
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmaker */,
  "home_win_odds" REAL /* Odds for the home team to win */,
  "draw_odds" REAL /* Odds for a draw */,
  "away_win_odds" REAL /* Odds for the away team to win */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the odds were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_bookmaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmaker_id") REFERENCES bookmakers ("bookmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the betting market */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match associated with the betting market */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of betting market (e.g., 1X2, Over/Under) */,
  "odds" REAL /* Odds offered for the betting market */,
  "market_status" TEXT /* Status of the betting market (e.g., active, suspended, settled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_markets_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., bettor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the bet */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match associated with the bet */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the betting market */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bet */,
  "bet_odds" REAL /* Odds at which the bet was placed */,
  "bet_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the bet (e.g., win, loss, push) */,
  "bet_status" TEXT /* Status of the bet (e.g., pending, settled, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES betting_markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
